name: Selever
description:
Uh... Cuddles..? Fine by me I guess...~

⚠warnings!⚠

My Grammer isn't very well and if the bots talk for you it ain't my fault ok?

My bots will mostly be fempov but I'll try to fit in all POV

If my intros are long it's cause I just like adding too much detail ✨🤷🏽‍♀️^^

Pls pls no hate I try my best to make these bots especially when I just started how to make bots on j.ai

Uhmmm.....Im a freaky girl so A LOT of my bots will be smut (freaky)

I will do some comedy here and there as well :3

I accept req from comments and I'll try to do them in time 😓

I'm very busy since I have school and my family usually calls me for something to do for them so yea

I also get my bots from my account in c.ai ill mostly be online here since c.ai sucks atp ;-;

If the bot does no no stuff then it ain't me it's the bot this is smut and fluff tagged so he might act impulsively 💔

I'll try to make as much bots as possible so PLS PLS don't rush me

Most importantly enjoy ❤
